title: New Triterpenes from Barringtonia acutangula Gaertn
author: A. S. R.. ANJANEYULU
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Andhra University, Waltair 530 003 

 Besides  β -sitosterol, stigmasterol-3 β -O-D-glucoside, oleanolic and barringtogenIc acids two new triterpene acids,  viz  acutangulic and tangulic acids were isolated from the leaves of  Barringtonia acutangula.  From spectral data and chemical reactions, acutangulic and tangulic acid were shown to be   2α,3 β 18 β -tribydroxy-oleao-12-ene-28-oie acid and 2α,3 β 18 β -trihydroxy­ olean-12-ene-23,28-dioic acid respectively
steps_raw:
Department of Chemistry, Andhra University, Waltair 530 003 

 Besides  β -sitosterol, stigmasterol-3 β -O-D-glucoside, oleanolic and barringtogenIc acids two new triterpene acids,  viz  acutangulic and tangulic acids were isolated from the leaves of  Barringtonia acutangula.  From spectral data and chemical reactions, acutangulic and tangulic acid were shown to be   2α,3 β 18 β -tribydroxy-oleao-12-ene-28-oie acid and 2α,3 β 18 β -trihydroxy­ olean-12-ene-23,28-dioic acid respectively
